#  Stateful Functions 3.3.0 Release Announcement
September 19, 2023 - Martijn Visser (@MartijnVisser82)
The Apache Flink community is excited to announce the release of Stateful Functions 3.3.0!
Stateful Functions is a cross-platform stack…
